nasb.text: “The eye is the lamp of the body; so then if your eye is clear, your whole body will be full of light.

esv.text: “The eye is the lamp of the body. So, if your eye is healthy, your whole body will be full of light,

cnv.text: “眼睛就是身體的燈。如果你的眼睛健全，全身就都明亮；

ccb.text: “眼睛是身上的灯。如果你的眼睛明亮，全身都光明；

csbs.text: “眼睛是身体的灯，所以，如果你的眼睛纯净    ，你的全身就光明；
